Catalog/Peripheral Intervention/Credence BtK Sirolimus Eluting BioResorbable Peripheral Scaffold System
🫀 Peripheral InterventionREF: CBK25032, CBK30032, CBK32532, CBK25040, CBK30040, CBK32540✓ Brochure Verified

Credence BtK Sirolimus Eluting BioResorbable Peripheral Scaffold System

Credence BtK · Peripheral Stents

An indigenously developed sirolimus-eluting bioresorbable scaffold system specifically designed for peripheral below-the-knee (BtK) technology and the treatment of stenotic lesions.

MaterialBioResorbable PLLA (Poly L-lactide)

Full Technical Matrix

Credence BtK Sirolimus Eluting BioResorbable Peripheral Scaffold System

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Scaffold Strut Thickness
100 µm
Scaffold Diameters
2.50, 3.00, 3.50 mm
Scaffold Lengths
32, 40 mm
Scaffold RO Markers
Platinum (Couplets of tri-axial RO markers on both ends, 120° apart)
Equivalent Drug Dose
1.25 µg / mm2
Nominal Pressure (NP)
9 atm
Rated Burst Pressure (RBP)
16 atm
Balloon Overhang
< 1 mm
Shaft Outer Diameter
Proximal: 2.13F, Distal: 2.7F
Radiopaque Markers
2 - Platinum / Iridium
Usable Catheter Length
142 cm
Sheath Compatibility
6 F (Min. I.D 0.070" / 1.8 mm)
Max. Guidewire Compatibility
0.014" (0.36 mm)

Scaffold Material

BioResorbable PLLA (Poly L-lactide)

Drug

Sirolimus

Top Coat Polymer

Bioresorbable PDLLA (Poly D, L-lactide)

Delivery System

Rapid Exchange

Primary Material

BioResorbable PLLA (Poly L-lactide)

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Indigenously developed peripheral BtK technology featuring sirolimus eluting bioresorbable scaffold system for peripheral vessel treatment with rapid exchange delivery system

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Credence BtK Sirolimus Eluting BioResorbable Peripheral Scaffold System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Credence BtK Sirolimus Eluting BioResorbable Peripheral Scaffold System is constructed using BioResorbable PLLA (Poly L-lactide), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
